case_title: MARRO, DONALD VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARRO, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $296.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-04-1995, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $485.00 FILED BY MARRO, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-07-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-08-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARRO, DONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
